verses.text: Mark opens, 'The beginning of the gospel of Jesus Christ, the Son of God,' with the promised messenger sent before. Good news. The whole book is gospel — glad tidings of the Son of God.
Mark opens, 'The beginning of the gospel of Jesus Christ, the Son of God,' with the promised messenger sent before. Good news. The whole book is gospel — glad tidings of the Son of God.
Mark opens, 'The beginning of the gospel of Jesus Christ, the Son of God,' with the promised messenger sent before. Good news. The whole book is gospel — glad tidings of the Son of God.
John baptizes in the wilderness, preaching repentance, and points beyond himself to One mightier who baptizes with the Holy Ghost. The herald. He decreases that Christ may increase.
John baptizes in the wilderness, preaching repentance, and points beyond himself to One mightier who baptizes with the Holy Ghost. The herald. He decreases that Christ may increase.
John baptizes in the wilderness, preaching repentance, and points beyond himself to One mightier who baptizes with the Holy Ghost. The herald. He decreases that Christ may increase.
John baptizes in the wilderness, preaching repentance, and points beyond himself to One mightier who baptizes with the Holy Ghost. The herald. He decreases that Christ may increase.
John baptizes in the wilderness, preaching repentance, and points beyond himself to One mightier who baptizes with the Holy Ghost. The herald. He decreases that Christ may increase.
Jesus is baptized; the heavens open, the Spirit descends, and a voice says, 'Thou art my beloved Son.' Heaven's witness. The Father owns His Son at the outset of His work.
Jesus is baptized; the heavens open, the Spirit descends, and a voice says, 'Thou art my beloved Son.' Heaven's witness. The Father owns His Son at the outset of His work.
Jesus is baptized; the heavens open, the Spirit descends, and a voice says, 'Thou art my beloved Son.' Heaven's witness. The Father owns His Son at the outset of His work.
The Spirit drives Him into the wilderness, tempted forty days, with wild beasts, and angels minister. Tested first. Before His ministry, He overcomes the tempter.
The Spirit drives Him into the wilderness, tempted forty days, with wild beasts, and angels minister. Tested first. Before His ministry, He overcomes the tempter.
He preaches, 'The time is fulfilled... repent ye, and believe the gospel.' The first call. Repentance and faith open the door of the kingdom.
He preaches, 'The time is fulfilled... repent ye, and believe the gospel.' The first call. Repentance and faith open the door of the kingdom.
By the sea He calls Simon, Andrew, James, and John, who 'straightway' leave their nets. Prompt following. At His word they forsake all without delay.
By the sea He calls Simon, Andrew, James, and John, who 'straightway' leave their nets. Prompt following. At His word they forsake all without delay.
By the sea He calls Simon, Andrew, James, and John, who 'straightway' leave their nets. Prompt following. At His word they forsake all without delay.
By the sea He calls Simon, Andrew, James, and John, who 'straightway' leave their nets. Prompt following. At His word they forsake all without delay.
By the sea He calls Simon, Andrew, James, and John, who 'straightway' leave their nets. Prompt following. At His word they forsake all without delay.
In the synagogue He teaches 'as one that had authority, and not as the scribes.' Fresh power. His word carries a weight the learned never had.
In the synagogue He teaches 'as one that had authority, and not as the scribes.' Fresh power. His word carries a weight the learned never had.
He rebukes an unclean spirit, which comes out crying. Authority over evil. The demons obey the voice they cannot resist.
He rebukes an unclean spirit, which comes out crying. Authority over evil. The demons obey the voice they cannot resist.
He rebukes an unclean spirit, which comes out crying. Authority over evil. The demons obey the voice they cannot resist.
He rebukes an unclean spirit, which comes out crying. Authority over evil. The demons obey the voice they cannot resist.
All are amazed, 'What new doctrine is this?' and His fame spreads through Galilee. Wondering crowds. His word and works set the whole region talking.
All are amazed, 'What new doctrine is this?' and His fame spreads through Galilee. Wondering crowds. His word and works set the whole region talking.
He heals Simon's wife's mother of a fever, and she rises and serves them. Restored to service. Christ's healing fits us to minister to Him.
He heals Simon's wife's mother of a fever, and she rises and serves them. Restored to service. Christ's healing fits us to minister to Him.
He heals Simon's wife's mother of a fever, and she rises and serves them. Restored to service. Christ's healing fits us to minister to Him.
At evening they bring all the sick, and He heals many and casts out devils. Tireless mercy. He turns no needy one away.
At evening they bring all the sick, and He heals many and casts out devils. Tireless mercy. He turns no needy one away.
At evening they bring all the sick, and He heals many and casts out devils. Tireless mercy. He turns no needy one away.
Rising long before day, He seeks a solitary place to pray. Prayer first. The busiest servant of God makes time to be alone with the Father.
Rising long before day, He seeks a solitary place to pray. Prayer first. The busiest servant of God makes time to be alone with the Father.
Rising long before day, He seeks a solitary place to pray. Prayer first. The busiest servant of God makes time to be alone with the Father.
Let us go to the next towns, 'for therefore came I forth'; He preaches throughout Galilee. On the move. He will not stay where He is sought, but presses on to preach.
Let us go to the next towns, 'for therefore came I forth'; He preaches throughout Galilee. On the move. He will not stay where He is sought, but presses on to preach.
A leper pleads, 'If thou wilt'; moved with compassion, Jesus touches him, 'I will; be thou clean.' Willing touch. He cleanses the outcast none else would touch.
A leper pleads, 'If thou wilt'; moved with compassion, Jesus touches him, 'I will; be thou clean.' Willing touch. He cleanses the outcast none else would touch.
A leper pleads, 'If thou wilt'; moved with compassion, Jesus touches him, 'I will; be thou clean.' Willing touch. He cleanses the outcast none else would touch.
Charged to silence, the man spreads it abroad, so Jesus can no more openly enter the city. Overflowing joy. Mercy received cannot be kept quiet.
Charged to silence, the man spreads it abroad, so Jesus can no more openly enter the city. Overflowing joy. Mercy received cannot be kept quiet.
